_note: SPECIFICATION, not a verified Jira export. Build in the rule builder, then export from Automation and replace this file. See automation/README.md.
name: Close resolved tickets after 5 quiet days

conditions.jql: project = OPS AND status = Resolved AND updated <= -5d

actions.body: Closed automatically after 5 days without response. Reopen if the issue persists.

whyItExists: Stops the Resolved column quietly becoming a second backlog.
